author: yu314-coder
name: SP8192 Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + TTT
blurb: SP8192 tokenizer, 11-layer transformer with depth recurrence (layers 3-5 looped 3x = 17 virtual layers), parallel residuals for layers 7+, partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, EMA averaging, score-first test-time training, Muon optimizer, cosine warmdown, int8+zlib quantization. Preliminary BPB ~1.19 on 8xH100 (artifact size needs final validation run with mlp_mult=2).
